race.comment: COMMON INTEREST (3) has left himself with too much ground to make up in his two runs back but has warming nicely late. Drops back to a much easier assignment and draws to get all the favours for Toeroek who sticks. 1400m looks perfect for him third-up. ARAMOSO (2) finally got off the mark at long last at the latest when running away from them over this trip at Oakbank. Full of confidence now and can go on with it. AFFAIRE VUE (12) showed good tactical speed here fresh, only to tire late but wasn't beaten that far in sixth. Can quickly offset the wide alley and should prove tougher to reel in with that run under her belt. STOLEN KISS (11) possesses a strong turn of foot on her day and is one to watch for late if they overdo it in front.
